content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4

## Summary

Found 1 regression. The new preflight helper correctly honors dedicated final-review panel resolution, but it also drops planner-specific failure identity and breaks the existing feature-gated workflow_engine preflight test.

## Amendments

1. src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs:381-385 regresses preflight inspectability by collapsing every final-review resolution error into a generic "final-review panel resolution failed" message. That strips the failing member identity for planner/arbiter/reviewer failures; the existing feature-gated assertion at tests/unit/workflow_engine_test.rs:2060-2064 now fails because a planner resolution error no longer mentions "planner". Keep the dedicated final_review planner/arbiter resolution path, but preserve member-specific wrapping (or otherwise propagate the exact failing target/config source) so preflight failures still identify which final-review member failed.
   Rationale: This is a correctness regression in the operator-facing preflight path and leaves the branch with a failing existing test: cargo test --quiet --features test-stub --test unit preflight_check_validates_final_review_planner_member -- --nocapture.
